name: All Exclusive Trnsprtn Svc LLC
recent_news: Small Warren, MI livery/transport operator (est. 2007); appears on Yellow Pages/Birdeye/Manta with ~2-6 employees; FMCSA USDOT 2553195 record exists. No M&A or school-district contract activity found.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-vehicle livery operator (~6 employees, ~$364K rev). Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in; possible only as bolt-on if combined with other Macomb County micro-operators serving SPED alternative-transport routes.

name: Charles Limo
recent_news: Small owner-operated livery service in Mount Clemens, MI (Macomb County) at 219 N Wilson Blvd; principal Charles Daniels. No web presence, no M&A activity, no confirmed school-bus contracts located in public search.
fit_notes: Single-principal Mount Clemens livery; flagged as special-needs in source data but appears to be a traditional limo service, not a school-bus contractor. Too small for a stand-alone Summit tuck-in; only relevant as part of a roll-up of Macomb County alternative-SPED vendors.

name: North Star Transportation
recent_news: No identifiable web presence located; only a 586-area-code Macomb County phone number (586-215-8010). Multiple unrelated 'North/Northern Star Transportation' companies exist in MN/AK/elsewhere but do not match this Michigan record. Possibly a micro/owner-operated SPED transport vendor.
fit_notes: Unverified micro-operator; insufficient information to assess. Not actionable as a Summit tuck-in without further offline diligence (state carrier-license lookup, district contract records).

name: On Time Limousine Svc Inc
recent_news: Sterling Heights, MI livery operator at 36437 Tulane Dr; appears in WhereOrg/local directories. No school-district contract records, no M&A or ownership-change signals found in public sources.
fit_notes: Sub-scale Macomb County livery (~6 employees, ~$364K rev). Not a school-bus operator; potentially a small SPED alt-transport vendor. Far below Summit's tuck-in threshold on a stand-alone basis.

name: Rainbow Limousine Svc
recent_news: Small Saint Clair Shores, MI livery at 22641 Edgewood St; rainbowlimosvc.com appears to reference a PA-based operator, not this MI entity. No M&A, ownership-change, or school-district contract signals found.
fit_notes: Single-principal St. Clair Shores livery; flagged special-needs in source data but presents as a traditional limo service. Too small for a stand-alone Summit tuck-in; only relevant as part of a wider SPED alt-transport roll-up in Macomb County.
